title: thelypteris carrii
intro: Thelypteris carrii, also known as the Carrii maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Thelypteris carrii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving digestion and immunity. Thelypteris carrii can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a powder or tincture.
